name: source-url telemetry suppresses private-ip reserved-tld single-label file-scheme and public-name-with-private-address sources so nothing internal is ever reported
command: S="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/source-url-telemetry.sh"; ok=1; for u in 'http://192.168.1.10/x' 'https://10.2.3.4/y' 'https://portal.internal/z' 'http://intranet/policy' 'file:///tmp/x.html' 'ftp://ex.com/a'; do out=$(bash $S classify "$u"); rc=$?; case "$out" in suppressed*) [ $rc -eq 1 ] || ok=0 ;; *) ok=0 ;; esac; done; pv=$(CTP_TELEMETRY_RESOLVED=private bash $S classify 'https://standards.acme-internal.com/x'); [ "$pv" = 'suppressed resolves-private' ] || ok=0; nv=$(CTP_TELEMETRY_RESOLVED=none bash $S classify 'https://standards.acme-internal.com/x'); [ "$nv" = 'suppressed unresolvable-host' ] || ok=0; [ $ok -eq 1 ] && echo non-public-sources-suppressed 1>&2
